title: Cosmos Infinia
description: Simple Space Exploration Mod. Explore The Interstellar Voids
body:
### **Available on Forge and Neoforge
### 
### CURIOS API is needed
### 
### Please join my discord because it means a lot and i post teasers for upcoming mods and updates!
### [My Discord Server](https://discord.gg/HFhwPphsCq)
### Go on my Curseforge if u want a description with the images ;)**

This mod is based around space, letting you explore new lands with special, otherworldly environments. Experience custom ambiences that amplify the lonely and dangerous vibes of alien planets.

For now, the following features have been added:

Rocket Traveling GUI: Press N when inside a rocket placed on a Rocket Platform.
  Select a Destination then click Launch.











Wearing a Space Suit Helmet gives you the following information: (Toggable with U)

1. Temperature
2. Oxygen Units
3. Current Location
4. Selected Travel Location for the current Rocket you're in.

5. Jet Fuel in Space Chestplate (If it has Jetpack Augment)
6.Radiation Level of Current Planet/Environment
7. Radiation Resistance (Sum of all Rad Resistances *in Space Suit Pieces* / 4)

If Radiation Resistance is lower you'll get the Radiated Effect 


Tiers of Rockets, Space Suits, Astro-Chests and Astro-packs

 

-Tier 1 is Iron
 -Tier 2 is Stelliron
 -Tier 3 is Voidsteel

-Tier 4 is an upgraded Tier 3 Rocket

 -Astro-Chests added (Hold a lot more   slots than Vanilla Chests)

 -Astro-Packs added (Backpacks but Cosmic :D)



Rockets (Tier 1-3): Build and upgrade your way to the stars.
Space Suits (Tier 1-3): Survive the harshness of space with proper gear.
Rocket Launch Countdown: Feel the thrill of liftoff with a dramatic countdown.
Ice and Lava Asteroids: These spawn around Earth and have Asteron Ore, Raw Iron Blocks and Stelliron Ore used in MOST  recipes. Stelliron is the resource you'll use the most

Moon Dome: (Updated)

-You can find an Oxygen Generator and Oxygen Chargers inside along with some Magenta Beds.



Cloth Mesh: A crucial item for crafting space suits.
Circuits: Copper, Asteron, Photocite, Astrithium and Accelerite
Oxygen Tanks: 2500, 5000 and 7500 (Oxygen Capacity from Left to Right)
Astro-Fuel Canisters.

Environmental Effects: Experience Low Gravity, No Oxygen, Sun Vaporization, Toxin Exposure, Radiated and Frostbite on alien worlds.

-Toxin Exposure burns and damages you. You can get it by being inside a Sulfuric Cloud + High Armor Damage
-Radiated makes you very weak. Each Level is different.

All Planets have a level of Radiation from 0 to 3. Also Photocite, Plutonium, Astrithium and Uranium give Radiated if you don't have the proper Gear.
Level 1 - Poison, Fatigue, Nausea, Weakness
Level 2 - Poison, Fatigue, Nausea, Weakness, Slowness (higher amplifier)

Level 3 - Wither, Fatigue, Nausea, Weakness, Slowness (higher amplifier)

-To avoid Radiation equip a full Space Suit. Each Tier 1 Suit has a base of 1 Rad Resistance, While Tier 2 has a base 2 Rad Resistance. Tier 3 has a base 3 Rad Resistance. Insert Radiation Augments into your armor to increase Rad Resistance. 

New Destinations: Explore Earth Orbital Zone, the Moon, Mars, Venus, Mercury, Titan and the Asteroid Belt.
11 New Ores: Discover rare materials on your journey.

Lunar Silica Ore: Found on the Moon. Can make Lamps from it.
Lumiovite Silica Ore: Found on Titan. Can make Lamps from it.
Photocite Ore: Found on Mercury. Used in Space-Tech Machines and Augments
Asthritium Ore: Found on Mercury. Used in Space-Tech Machines and Circuits
Asteron Ore: Found in Asteroids and the Asteroid Belt. Used in Space-Tech making.
Aresium Ore: Found on Mars. Used in Space-Tech making.
Carbognite Ore: Found on Mars. Used as a Coal replacement.
Uranium and Plutonium: Found on Venus (Fuels)
Accelerite Ore: Found on Europa. Used in Space-Tech Machines, Circuits and can be made into an Accelerite Module (Used in Machines and Astro-Augmentor for Boots)
Voidsteel Alloy: Made from Stelliron and Aresium. Used in Tier 2 Space-Tech making.
Stelliron Alloy: Made from Asteron and Iron. Used in Tier 1 Space-Tech making. Can be found Naturally inside Asteroids along side Asteron.

-New Ores of already existing materials have been added to Ecliptron and the Asteroid belt



Space Building Blocks:

-Moon Bricks, Marsian Bricks, Venusian Bricks, Mercurian Bricks, Asteroid and Titanian Bricks 

Astro-Tool Sets: (Drills added)

-Voidsteel Tool Set (Tier 2)
-Stelliron Tool Set (Tier 1)

Astro-Blocks:

From left to right: Astro-Ladder, Astro-Door, Astro-Seal Door, Astro-Glass, Space Station Compartments Placer (Garden, Orb Core, Tunnel Core, Launch Room)

-Now you can make Stelliron Foundation stairs and slabs :D

-These are made to fit the Space Theme and are functional, also the Door slides :D

-The Astro-Seal Door opens and closes when Right-Clicked
-Astro-Glass has high Blast Res and drops when broken

-Space Station Compartments Placer Can place: Garden Orb, Orb Core, Tunnel Core, All Tunnels, Rocket Launch Room in all directions, but not favored to place Gardens and Rocket Launch rooms below or up.

-Space Station Tunnel Placer Can place: 9 Blocks long and 13 Blocks long Tunnels in all directions.

Try not to overlap them or one will get destroyed :/
Right Click the Placer to open a GUI in which you can select what Compartment/Tunnel to place

Garden Orb

 -Contains Flowers, Grass and an Oak Sapling + a great view of the Void surroinding you

Orb Core

 -Contains 1 Aqua Tank + can expand in all directions.

Tunnel Core










  

-Can Make Tunnels in all directions or can be left as is. Kinda like an exit if you want to see the Void

Tunnels

-Horizontal Tunnels

-Vertical Tunnels

Rocket Launch Room

-Your only way to going back to your Home Earth or another Planet depends who you ask. It doesn't come with a Rocket



Advancements: (UPDATED again, but not shown in images)

Unlock helpful guides and earn rewards as you progress.

Infinity Opus:

A book filled with planetary knowledge, gifted to you upon starting the world.

Every Page has information about a specific Celestial Body.
DO NOT lose this book. But if you do just type /give_space_book in the chat to get a new one!

Here are some examples:

(ALL Travelable Destinations have information about them)

Mobs
Ecliptrids

-There are many Variations of the Ecliptrid based on where they spawn.

-Ecliptrids spawn in ALL Travelable Alien Destinations

-They are passive unless provoked, very similar to the Zombie Pigmen

-Drops Flesh that you can cook. (Very yummy)









Their Love for Nature is big

Mutated Ecliptrid

-These mobs spawn on Ecliptron they infect normal Ecliptrids

-Aggressive towards players





























Marsian Parasitefish: An edible mob with an invisible body and blue glowing outlines. 




Titanian Cryofish: An edible mob with a brownish body and a green glowing belly.     

Gives Night Vision when eaten.

Chemistric Machines Explained:

Gas Cells are special items used to store and transport gases like Oxygen, Hydrogen, Methane, and more. You’ll use them in machines across the mod.

🔧 How to Get Gas Cells:

1. Craft an Empty Gas Cell

2. Start with the Astro-Gas Compressor

-Inserts bucket fluids into the Gas Cell

3. Use the Astro-Electrolyzer

-This machine currently can split H20 Cells into 1x H and 2x O2. O2 is used for all Oxygen Related Machines and etc.

4. Refine Gases using the Astro-Refinery.

-Refines certain Gas Cells for later use like Astro-Fuel making.

Astro-Fuel Machines

-Fuel Pipes, Fuel Tanks, Fuel-Synthesizer (L) and Fuel Charger (R)

I think you know what the Tanks and Pipes are supposed to do so lets get to the other.

1. Astro-Fuel Synthesizer

-Put Refined Gas Cells or Carbon Cells to generate Astro-Fuel. You can put a Gas Canister to get it filled or if not it'll go into the machines reservoir if there's space for it. (Refined Noctilene, Methane, Hydrogen and Basic Carbon)

2. Fuel Charger

-Works like the Oxygen Charger, but charges Astro-Fuel into Chestplates with Jetpacks. You can switch if it takes AF from the Machine or the Canister in the lower slot.

Breathing System and Machines:

Alien planets lack oxygen, so you’ll need to create your own. Choose between:

A fully equipped space suit (fuel it using the Oxygen Charger).
An Oxygen Field Generator.  (MECHANIC REWORKED) 
!!!!!!!!!!

-The Oxygen Generator now spawns Oxygenized Air that travels by itself instead of making a Sphere around it. Breaking the Oxygen Generator removes the Oxygenized Air. Try to encapsule yourself or your oxygen will escape into the Atmosphere.

You can put Oxygen Gas Cells/Oxygen Tanks inside the slot with their Respectable Icons to give Oxygen to the Oxygen Generator. 

Aqua Tank, Aqua Pump and Aqua Pipes:

-All of these Aqua Blocks can transport Water (configurable in GUIs which are indentical)

-The Aqua Tank is a block which stores Water (Up to 10 Buckets) You can take out and put Water in the Tank.

Same goes for the other blocks, except the Aqua Pump which collects the water around it.

Left is Oxygen Field Generator. Right is Oxygen Charger. 

Aqua Tanks are below the Machines.

Key Details:
To charge your Space Suit Chest Plate, right-click while holding an Oxygen Tank Refill. (old image)

Both the chest plate and refills can be charged in the Oxygen Charger, with capacities of 2500 (Tank Refill), 5000 (Tier 1 Chest Plate), and 7500 (Tier 2 Chest Plate).
(Chest plates require a full space suit equipped to function properly) (GUI UPDATED)

You can put Oxygen Gas Cells/Oxygen Tanks inside the slot with their Respectable Icons to load Oxygen inside the items. The slot that's outlined will load Oxygen into the Machine itself.

Charging requires Air (only in Breathable Dimensions) or Oxygenized Air (from an Oxygen Field Generator) above the Oxygen Charger.
RF Energy

-Solar Panel added (Self-Explanatory)

-Battery and Pipes added (Basic, Advanced)

 -Wrench added (R-Click to toggle the side corresponding to looked direction)
-RF Meter added (R-Click to get RF of clicked block)

-Flux Cells (Store Forge Energy)

Carbo-Flux Generator

-Put Fuels to generate Forge Energy. Put Flux Cells into the Blue Slot to charge them.

Astro-Extractor

-This Machine turns simple Planetary Soil/Rock blocks into their separate ingredients + efficiently extracts Ore Bits.

-It uses RF Energy

 You can get the following resources:
 -Silica Dust (Made into Silica Plate)
 -Iron Oxide (Smelt into Iron Ingot)

 -Clay
 -Ice Crystal (Crafted into Ice)
 -Raw Aresium

 -Sulfur Dust



Astro-Furnace

-Purple Slot is for Accelerite Modules

-Blue Slot is for loading RF Energy with Flux Battery

-This Furnace is way stronger and faster than your boring Vanilla Furnace. Can use all vanilla fuels.

-You can fuel it just like a normal Furnace, but this one has a Fuel Cap of 20000 and can store the fuel without needing to always have a fuel in the slot. You can switch from RF Mode to Fuel Mode

Astro-Augmentor and Augments

-This machine allows you to Insert Augments into your Space Suit Pieces.
All pieces can have the Radiation Resistance Augment inserted in them if they have less than 3 Rad Resistance
The Jetpack Augment can be inserted into the Chestplates only.

-The Jetpack has a fuel of 10000, fuel it in the Fuel Charger. You can press X to toggle the Jetpack. Sneaking makes you slowly descend. Standing still makes you go just up. If you toggle it while moving you'll go up and to the direction you're looking at. When you touch the ground the Jetpack deactivates. (Fall Damage is negated)


-Also now Space Boots can Dash. Press C to Dash. If you're sprinting you'll dash very far and if you are moving less you'll dash less. Can use Accelerite Modules. Press Y to toggle boot speeds 0-3.

EOZ - Earth Orbital Zone

 -When you first travel to the EOZ you will be teleported to random X and Z   coordinates and at Y=100 and you'll be inside a Space Station Main Core.
 -Each Player has their own base. I reccomend using Journey Map or any   mod which has a map that can help you tp to your friends bases. In the   future If figured out a Teleporter can be implemented.







Heres an example of a Space Station I made.

Ecliptrid Structures

-The Moon, Mars, Venus and Mercury can have 3 types of Alien Huts spawning throughout their Eerie Landscapes

Marsian Noctilene Lakes

-Generates undrground along with Carbognite Ore.

Ecliptron

-Tier 4 Planet

-Ruined Cities spawn throughout the Planet containing Voidsteel Chests and Rocket Platforms





























Europa - Not Europe

 -Accelerite Ore

-Added Thermovents

 -Thermovent Core (Decorative Light, for now)

 -Added Corals

 -Added Thalasstric Fish (Yummy)

 -Surface Ice Spikes and Lesser Ice Plains

 -Europan Ice and Spikes

-Europan Thermovent and Coral Plains

-Europan Barren Plains

Venus - Earths Sister
-Sulfur Clouds Layer

-Venusian Terrain



Current Venusian Additions:

-All Venusian Ores now give Radiated if not protected by a Space Suit.

-Sulfuric Lamp and Sulfur Dust obtained from Sulfuric Clouds

Titan - Moon of Saturn

Biomes:

-Frozen Dunes
-Titanian Methane Lake Plains and Titanian Hazy Highlands

Current Titanian Additions:

Lumiovite Silica Ore

-Can be used to craft Green Lamps.

Planned additions:

Pluto, Uranus, Saturn and Jupiter (Moons to be exact)

Bugs may exist please report any issues so they can be fixed!
